title: Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd!
